description_long: This object is a spiky, rosette-shaped plant with long, narrow, pointed leaves radiating outward from a central base. The leaves are predominantly olive green with lighter edges and some subtle shading, giving them a slightly variegated appearance. The plant appears dense and symmetrical, with each leaf tapering to a sharp tip, creating a starburst effect. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the plant is either modeled without one or the pot is obscured by the foliage. The overall form is low and wide, typical of many ornamental agave or yucca species used in urban landscaping. The surface of the leaves looks firm and slightly matte, with no visible decorative elements or plant labels.
description: A dense, spiky plant with long, pointed olive green leaves radiating outward in a starburst pattern, resembling an agave or yucca. No visible pot or decorative elements are present.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the symmetrical, radial arrangement of the pointed leaves and the dense central cluster.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the overlapping leaves and the plant's low, wide profile.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the length and sharpness of the leaves, with the plant's base mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, showing the layered structure and the spread of the leaves from the center.
